level_signals: 6+ years of experience in Consulting, PMO, Portfolio Management, or Strategic Initiatives
Operates as trusted operational partner to senior leaders
Ability to influence senior engineering leadership
Title includes 'Staff' prefix indicating a senior individual contributor level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of experience in Consulting (internal or external), Project Management Office, Portfolio Management, or Strategic Initiatives teams.
You are proficient with JIRA and confident working alongside technical professionals.
You are excited to use GenAI as an enabler for automation and optimization, making processes and the organization as a whole more efficient.
Ability to operate as a trusted operational partner to senior leaders — translating financial and operational complexity into clear actions that help them hit their plans.
Proven experience in identifying and solving bottlenecks, not just solutioning.
Comfortable dealing with data and gathering insights.
Proven experience in designing complex, organization-wide reporting or governance frameworks.
Ability to influence senior engineering leadership and align conflicting views between legal, finance, and technical teams.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: IT Capitalization: Familiarity with the IT capitalization process is a plus.

scope.surface: Product Portfolio Management team within HelloTech IT & Tech organization; processes including IT Capitalization, delivery reporting, R&D Tax Credit applications
primary_metrics_inferred: Compliance accuracy for IT Capitalization and R&D Tax Credit
core_responsibilities: Lead the improvement and automation of workflows such as IT capitalization, R&D tax credit applications, and delivery reporting, moving from manual individual inputs to an automated, tool-driven, AI-supported process.
Serve as the primary point of contact for process audits, ensuring compliance and accurate documentation.
Develop and maintain automated workflows integrating JIRA, GitHub, and Workday to capture technical work metadata for financial reporting in our HelloTech organization.
Manage strategic projects to improve efficiency within HelloTech, such as improved Contractor Onboarding or the application of GenAI in reporting.
Partner with Tribe Leads, Engineering, and Product Managers to gain insights and maintain and improve our reporting landscape for deliveries and key metrics.
Support with the preparation of (Senior) Leadership meetings and Demo Sessions.
Support tech leaders in tracking spend vs. plan, flagging variances, and maintaining visibility into headcount, open roles, and contractor ratios.
Support quarterly and annual planning rhythms — OKR cycles, QBRs, AOP inputs — ensuring leadership has what they need, when they need it.

green_flags: Role clearly scoped within a named team (Product Portfolio Management) with specific process ownership areas
Modern tech stack explicitly mentioned (JIRA, GitHub, Workday, GenAI)
Global scale mentioned (6+ million customers, 1000+ person HelloTech org) gives meaningful scope
JD explicitly encourages non-traditional candidates who don't tick all boxes
Commitment to respond within 5 business days
red_flags: Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not stated — unclear for non-Polish candidates
Location flexibility not addressed — listed as Warsaw onsite but no hybrid/remote policy stated
JD notes candidates 'may also be considered for opportunities across different teams or projects', suggesting role scope or team placement may shift post-hire

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'Staff' title prefix, 6+ years requirement, and nature of responsibilities)
seniority.manages_people (inferred as false; no direct reports mentioned)
scope.business_model (inferred from JD description of HelloFresh's subscription D2C model)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated explicitly)
scope.team_size_estimate (inferred from '1000+ people' in HelloTech; actual team size not stated)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'Work with HelloFresh in Warsaw'; no hybrid/remote language in body)
ambiguities: IT Capitalization is listed under 'The Ingredients' section without a 'plus' qualifier in the header, but the body text says 'is a plus' — classified as nice_to_have accordingly
The JD mentions candidates may be considered 'across different teams or projects', creating ambiguity about the exact team/alliance this role will sit in
Office time requirement and hybrid policy are not specified despite the role being tied to Warsaw
